COURT RULES PLNTF PATEL TO RECOVER FROM DEF FREEMAN RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF 106 6TH STREET #418, SAN FRANCISCO, TOGETHER WITH DAMAGES TOTALLING $1525.58. JUDGMENT SIGNED IN OPEN COURT.
